frontmatter_compliance.notes: All required fields present; valid semver; no angle brackets; allowed-tools hyphenated. Description 1023 chars — 1 under 1024 ceiling, dangerously close. composes_with includes two archived skills.

description_quality.notes: Action verb (Help), 15+ concrete trigger phrases, very pushy. But 1023 chars at the ceiling and multiline scalar with awkward wraps.

progressive_disclosure.notes: Body 162 lines / ~1405 words. Single reference routing-table.md (148 lines) linked with when-to-read context. Below TOC threshold. Bonus evals/ directory for trigger testing.

instruction_clarity.notes: Four modes (Recall/Catalog/Explain/Route) in clear table. Each mode has output format example. Imperative voice. Core principle 'name, don't invoke' well-articulated with exception clause.

coordination.notes: composes_with at L24 lists archived skill-audit and skill-deep-review — broken cross-skill references. Body at L131 and L144 also reference dead skills, so the skill would actively misroute users.

completeness.notes: routing-table.md exists. Output format examples comprehensive. L30 hardcodes '38 repo skills' which is stale (CLAUDE.md says ~46). Evals infrastructure present.

anti_patterns.notes: Excellent anti-patterns table with rationale. 'When NOT to invoke' actively prevents over-triggering. Imperative voice. But routing rule at L131 directs users to dead skills.

critical.item: composes_with references two archived skills (skill-audit, skill-deep-review)
Routing rule at L131 sends users to dead skills
critical.fix: Change to '"Audit / review my skills" → skill-review (--scope=all for broad, --scope=<name> for deep)'.

critical.item: 'When NOT to invoke' rule at L144 references dead skill-audit

important.item: Description at 1023 chars is 1 char under the 1024 hard ceiling
important.fix: Tighten multi-clause sentence at L11-15 to drop ~200 chars while keeping strongest 4-5 trigger contexts.

important.item: Hardcoded '38 repo skills' is stale (CLAUDE.md says ~46)
important.fix: Change to '40+ repo skills plus plugin skills' or omit the number entirely.

nits.item: Description uses multiline | block scalar with hard wraps that don't add value
nits.fix: Consider folding to single paragraph for better readability.

nits.item: Mermaid rendering suggestion at L121 doesn't reference mermaid-charts skill
nits.fix: Point at mermaid-charts as the proper implementation skill.

nits.item: Plugin location at L62 is environment-dependent
nits.fix: Add 'or wherever Claude Code is configured to load them.'

nits.item: Anti-patterns table at L149-157 uses double-line formatting inconsistent with other tables
nits.fix: Normalize to standard pipe-table formatting matching L35-40.

top_fixes.fix: Replace archived-skill references (skill-audit, skill-deep-review) with current skill-review across composes_with and body routing rules
Trim description below 800 chars to leave headroom under the 1024 ceiling
Update stale '38 repo skills' count to current number or drop entirely
